notes: Use Notion MCP first for saved governance views.
Keep repo config as the source of truth for intended governance filters and layouts.
Use Playwright only if MCP cannot complete a governance view task cleanly.

views.name: Disabled Policies
views.purpose: Review modeled policies that stay disabled until Phase 7.
views.configure: FILTER "Execution Mode" = "Disabled"; SHOW "Name", "Provider", "Mutation Class", "Approval Rule", "Identity Type"; SORT BY "Name" ASC

views.name: Shadow Policies
views.purpose: Review policies that are safe to shadow-log without any external mutation.
views.configure: FILTER "Execution Mode" = "Shadow"; SHOW "Name", "Provider", "Mutation Class", "Approval Rule"; SORT BY "Name" ASC

views.name: Future Live Candidates
views.purpose: Review policies that could become governed live candidates in a future phase.
views.configure: SHOW "Name", "Provider", "Mutation Class", "Execution Mode", "Dry Run Required", "Rollback Required"; SORT BY "Execution Mode" ASC

views.name: Pending Approval
views.purpose: Review requests waiting on a human approval decision.
views.configure: FILTER "Status" = "Pending Approval"; SHOW "Name", "Local Project", "Policy", "Requested At", "Expires At"; SORT BY "Requested At" DESC

views.name: Approved Ready
views.purpose: Review approved requests that remain non-executed in Phase 6.
views.configure: FILTER "Status" = "Approved"; SHOW "Name", "Local Project", "Policy", "Decided At", "Expires At"; SORT BY "Decided At" DESC

views.name: Rejected / Expired
views.purpose: Review requests that were rejected or expired before use.
views.configure: SHOW "Name", "Status", "Local Project", "Policy", "Decided At", "Expires At"; SORT BY "Decided At" DESC

views.name: By Project
views.purpose: Browse the full approval ledger by linked project.
views.configure: SHOW "Name", "Local Project", "Status", "Policy", "Requested At", "Expires At"; SORT BY "Requested At" DESC

views.name: Disabled
views.purpose: Review endpoints that remain fully disabled in Phase 6.
views.configure: FILTER "Mode" = "Disabled"; SHOW "Name", "Provider", "Receiver Path", "Secret Env Var"; SORT BY "Name" ASC

views.name: Shadow Ready
views.purpose: Review endpoints that are configured for verified shadow-mode receipt capture.
views.configure: FILTER "Mode" = "Shadow"; SHOW "Name", "Provider", "Receiver Path", "Replay Window Minutes", "Last Delivery At"; SORT BY "Provider" ASC

views.name: Misconfigured
views.purpose: Review endpoints that likely need secret or path fixes before use.
views.configure: SHOW "Name", "Provider", "Mode", "Secret Env Var", "Replay Window Minutes"; SORT BY "Mode" ASC

views.name: Recent Verified
views.purpose: Review the newest verified logical webhook deliveries.
views.configure: FILTER "Verification Result" = "Valid"; SHOW "Name", "Provider", "Event Type", "Status", "Last Seen At", "Receipt Count"; SORT BY "Last Seen At" DESC

views.name: Duplicates
views.purpose: Review logical deliveries that have seen duplicate or redelivered receipts.
views.configure: FILTER "Status" = "Duplicate"; SHOW "Name", "Provider", "Receipt Count", "Last Seen At"; SORT BY "Last Seen At" DESC

views.name: Rejected
views.purpose: Review deliveries that failed verification or processing.
views.configure: FILTER "Verification Result" = "Invalid Signature"; SHOW "Name", "Provider", "Event Type", "Verification Result", "Last Seen At"; SORT BY "Last Seen At" DESC

views.name: Needs Reconcile
views.purpose: Review GitHub deliveries that need follow-up or reconcile handling.
views.configure: FILTER "Status" = "Failed"; SHOW "Name", "Provider", "Event Type", "Failure Notes", "Last Seen At"; SORT BY "Last Seen At" DESC

views.name: Recent Receipts
views.purpose: Review the raw receipt ledger in newest-first order.
views.configure: SHOW "Name", "Provider", "Received At", "Verification Result", "Drain Status"; SORT BY "Received At" DESC

views.name: Drain Failures
views.purpose: Review receipt rows that could not be drained into durable ledgers.
views.configure: FILTER "Drain Status" = "Failed"; SHOW "Name", "Provider", "Received At", "Failure Notes"; SORT BY "Received At" DESC

views.name: Rejected Signatures
views.purpose: Review receipts rejected during signature verification.
views.configure: FILTER "Verification Result" = "Invalid Signature"; SHOW "Name", "Provider", "Received At", "Failure Notes"; SORT BY "Received At" DESC
